{"files":{"/data/data/com.termux/files/home/ballooncg/ballooncg-website/src/components/Navbar.tsx":{"content":"'use client';\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';\nimport { Menu, X } from 'lucide-react';\n\nconst navLinks = [\n  { name: 'Home', href: '#home' },\n  { name: 'Services', href: '#services' },\n  { name: 'Portfolio', href: '#portfolio' },\n  { name: 'Contact', href: '#contact' },\n];\n\nexport default function Navbar() {\n  const [isScrolled, setIsScrolled] = useState(false);\n  const [isMobileMenuOpen, setIsMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handleScroll = () => {\n      setIsScrolled(window.scrollY > 50);\n    };\n    window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll);\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll);\n  }, []);\n\n  return (\n    <motion.nav\n      initial={{ y: -100 }}\n      animate={{ y: 0 }}\n      transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: 'easeOut' }}\n      className={`fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 transition-all duration-300 ${\n        isScrolled\n          ? 'bg-[var(--bg-secondary)]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[var(--border-light)]'\n          : 'bg-transparent'\n      }`}\n    >\n      <div className=\"section-container\">\n        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between h-20\">\n          <motion.a\n            href=\"#home\"\n            className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-gradient\"\n            whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }}\n          >\n            Balloon CG\n          </motion.a>\n\n          <div className=\"hidden md:flex items-center gap-8\">\n            {navLinks.map((link) => (\n              <motion.a\n                key={link.name}\n                href={link.href}\n                className=\"text-[var(--text-muted)] hover:text-[var(--text-main)] transition-colors relative group\"\n                whileHover={{ y: -2 }}\n              >\n                {link.name}\n                <span className=\"absolute -bottom-1 left-0 w-0 h-0.5 bg-[var(--accent-primary)] transition-all duration-300 group-hover:w-full\" />\n              </motion.a>\n            ))}\n            <motion.a\n              href=\"#contact\"\n              className=\"btn-glow\"\n              whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }}\n              whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}\n            >\n              Get Started\n            </motion.a>\n          </div>\n\n          <button\n            className=\"md:hidden p-2 text-[var(--text-main)]\"\n            onClick={() => setIsMobileMenuOpen(!isMobileMenuOpen)}\n            aria-label=\"Toggle menu\"\n          >\n            {isMobileMenuOpen ? <X size={24} /> : <Menu size={24} />}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <AnimatePresence>\n        {isMobileMenuOpen && (\n          <motion.div\n            initial={{ opacity: 0, height: 0 }}\n            animate={{ opacity: 1, height: 'auto' }}\n            exit={{ opacity: 0, height: 0 }}\n            className=\"md:hidden bg-[var(--bg-secondary)] border-b border-[var(--border-light)]\"\n          >\n            <div className=\"section-container py-6 flex flex-col gap-4\">\n              {navLinks.map((link) => (\n                <a\n                  key={link.name}\n                  href={link.href}\n                  className=\"text-lg text-[var(--text-muted)] hover:text-[var(--text-main)] transition-colors\"\n                  onClick={() => setIsMobileMenuOpen(false)}\n                >\n                  {link.name}\n                </a>\n              ))}\n              <a\n                href=\"#contact\"\n                className=\"btn-glow text-center mt-2\"\n                onClick={() => setIsMobileMenuOpen(false)}\n              >\n                Get Started\n              </a>\n            </div>\n          </motion.div>\n        )}\n      </AnimatePresence>\n    </motion.nav>\n  );\n}\n"},"/data/data/com.termux/files/home/ballooncg/ballooncg-website/src/components/Services.tsx":{"content":"'use client';\n\nimport { motion } from 'framer-motion';\nimport { Monitor, Layers, Palette, Zap, Lightbulb, Eye } from 'lucide-react';\n\nconst services = [\n  {\n    icon: Monitor,\n    title: 'LED Screen Content',\n    description: 'Bringing your vision to life with stunning LED display solutions for events of all sizes.',\n    features: ['High-resolution displays', 'Custom content creation', 'Live feed integration'],\n  },\n  {\n    icon: Layers,\n    title: 'Projection Mapping',\n    description: 'Transforming spaces with immersive projections that captivate and amaze your guests.',\n    features: ['3D mapping', 'Building projections', 'Interactive experiences'],\n  },\n  {\n    icon: Palette,\n    title: 'Creative Services',\n    description: 'Innovation in every frame with our expert creative team behind every visual.',\n    features: ['Motion graphics', 'Animation', 'Brand integration'],\n  },\n  {\n    icon: Zap,\n    title: 'Live Events',\n    description: 'Full-service AV production for conferences, concerts, and corporate events.',\n    features: ['Multi-screen setups', 'Live streaming', 'Technical crew'],\n  },\n  {\n    icon: Lightbulb,\n    title: 'Brand Activation',\n    description: 'Create memorable brand experiences with interactive visual installations.',\n    features: ['Interactive displays', 'Photo opportunities', 'Social media integration'],\n  },\n  {\n    icon: Eye,\n    title: 'Visual Design',\n    description: 'Professional visual design services to elevate your brand presence.',\n    features: ['Concept development', 'Storyboarding', 'Pre-visualization'],\n  },\n];\n\nexport default function Services() {\n  return (\n    <section id=\"services\" className=\"py-24 relative\">\n      <div className=\"section-container\">\n        <motion.div\n          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}\n          whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}\n          viewport={{ once: true }}\n          className=\"text-center mb-16\"\n        >\n          <span className=\"text-[var(--accent-primary)] font-medium\">Our Services</span>\n          <h2 className=\"text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold mt-2 mb-4\">\n            Tailored to Your <span className=\"text-gradient\">Needs</span>\n          </h2>\n          <p className=\"text-[var(--text-muted)] max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n            From intimate gatherings to large-scale productions, we deliver premium visual solutions \n            that exceed expectations.\n          </p>\n        </motion.div>\n\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6\">\n          {services.map((service, index) => (\n            <motion.div\n              key={service.title}\n              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}\n              whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}\n              viewport={{ once: true }}\n              transition={{ delay: index * 0.1 }}\n              className=\"glass-card p-8 group\"\n            >\n              <motion.div\n                whileHover={{ scale: 1.1, rotate: 5 }}\n                className=\"w-14 h-14 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-[var(--accent-primary)] to-[var(--accent-secondary)] flex items-center justify-center mb-6\"\n              >\n                <service.icon size={28} className=\"text-white\" />\n              </motion.div>\n              <h3 className=\"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 group-hover:text-gradient transition-colors\">\n                {service.title}\n              </h3>\n              <p className=\"text-[var(--text-muted)] mb-4\">{service.description}</p>\n              <ul className=\"space-y-2\">\n                {service.features.map((feature) => (\n                  <li key={feature} className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-[var(--text-muted)]\">\n                    <span className=\"w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-[var(--accent-primary)]\" />\n                    {feature}\n                  </li>\n                ))}\n              </ul>\n            </motion.div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </section>\n  );\n}\n"},"/data/data/com.termux/files/home/ballooncg/ballooncg-website/src/components/Footer.tsx":{"content":"'use client';\n\nimport { motion } from 'framer-motion';\nimport { Mail, Phone } from 'lucide-react';\n\nconst socialLinks = [\n  { name: 'Instagram', href: '#' },\n  { name: 'Facebook', href: '#' },\n  { name: 'LinkedIn', href: '#' },\n];\n\nexport default function Footer() {\n  return (\n    <footer className=\"bg-[var(--bg-secondary)] border-t border-[var(--border-light)]\">\n      <div className=\"section-container py-16\">\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-12\">\n          <div className=\"md:col-span-2\">\n            <motion.h3\n              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}\n              whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}\n              className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-gradient mb-4\"\n            >\n              Balloon CG Visuals\n            </motion.h3>\n            <p className=\"text-[var(--text-muted)] mb-6 max-w-md\">\n              Elevating events with stunning LED screens, projection mapping, and creative visual solutions. \n              Your vision, our expertise.\n            </p>\n            <div className=\"flex gap-4\">\n              {socialLinks.map((social, index) => (\n                <motion.a\n                  key={social.name}\n                  href={social.href}\n                  initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}\n                  whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}\n                  transition={{ delay: index * 0.1 }}\n                  whileHover={{ y: -3, color: 'var(--accent-primary)' }}\n                  className=\"text-[var(--text-muted)] transition-colors\"\n                >\n                  {social.name}\n                </motion.a>\n              ))}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div>\n            <h4 className=\"text-lg font-semibold mb-4\">Quick Links</h4>\n            <ul className=\"space-y-3\">\n              {['Home', 'Services', 'Portfolio', 'Contact'].map((link) => (\n                <li key={link}>\n                  <a\n                    href={`#${link.toLowerCase()}`}\n                    className=\"text-[var(--text-muted)] hover:text-[var(--accent-primary)] transition-colors\"\n                  >\n                    {link}\n                  </a>\n                </li>\n              ))}\n            </ul>\n          </div>\n\n          <div>\n            <h4 className=\"text-lg font-semibold mb-4\">Contact Us</h4>\n            <ul className=\"space-y-3\">\n              <li className=\"flex items-center gap-3 text-[var(--text-muted)]\">\n                <Mail size={18} className=\"text-[var(--accent-primary)]\" />\n                <a href=\"mailto:info@ballooncg.com\">info@ballooncg.com</a>\n              </li>\n              <li className=\"flex items-center gap-3 text-[var(--text-muted)]\">\n                <Phone size={18} className=\"text-[var(--accent-primary)]\" />\n                <span>+2-015-015-78910</span>\n              </li>\n              <li className=\"flex items-center gap-3 text-[var(--text-muted)]\">\n                <Phone size={18} className=\"text-[var(--accent-primary)]\" />\n                <span>+966-595-802280</span>\n              </li>\n            </ul>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"mt-12 pt-8 border-t border-[var(--border-light)] text-center text-[var(--text-muted)]\">\n          <p>© {new Date().getFullYear()} Balloon CG Visuals. All rights reserved.</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </footer>\n  );\n}\n"}}}
